description: CompositionBeige sleeves kurta made of 100% cotton, with printed side panels, round neck with pintucks on the front bib, and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this beige kurta from w!
